sql.if: AND ( cpi.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param.search}, '%') OR cpi.code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param.search}, '%') )

choose.when:
SELECT cpi.*, cu.nickname createByName FROM cat_process_instance cpi INNER JOIN cat_user cu ON cpi.create_by = cu.id WHERE cpi.deleted = '0' AND cpi.process_status = '0' AND cpi.create_by = #{param.userId}
ORDER BY cpi.update_time DESC

SELECT cpi.*, cu.nickname createByName FROM cat_process_instance cpi INNER JOIN cat_user cu ON cpi.create_by = cu.id WHERE cpi.deleted = '0' AND cpi.create_by = #{param.userId} AND cpi.process_status = '1'
ORDER BY cpi.update_time DESC

SELECT cpi.*, task.ID_ AS task_id, task.NAME_ AS taskName, cu.nickname createByName FROM ACT_RU_TASK task INNER JOIN ACT_RU_IDENTITYLINK il ON il.TASK_ID_ = task.ID_ AND il.TYPE_ = 'candidate' AND il.USER_ID_ = #{param.userId} INNER JOIN cat_process_instance cpi ON cpi.process_instance_id = task.PROC_INST_ID_ AND cpi.deleted = '0' INNER JOIN cat_user cu ON cpi.create_by = cu.id WHERE task.ASSIGNEE_ IS NULL
AND ( cpi.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param.search}, '%') OR cpi.code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param.search}, '%') )
AND cpi.process_definition_id = #{param.processDefinitionId}
ORDER BY task.CREATE_TIME_ DESC

SELECT cpi.*, cu.nickname createByName FROM cat_process_instance cpi INNER JOIN cat_user cu ON cpi.create_by = cu.id WHERE cpi.deleted = '0' AND cpi.create_by = #{param.userId}
ORDER BY cpi.update_time DESC
choose.otherwise: SELECT cpi.*, cu.nickname createByName FROM cat_process_instance cpi INNER JOIN cat_user cu ON cpi.create_by = cu.id WHERE 1 = 2

mapper.select: SELECT cpi.*, cu.nickname createByName, cpd.id processDefinitionId, cpd.process_name processDefinitionName FROM cat_process_instance cpi INNER JOIN cat_user cu ON cpi.create_by = cu.id INNER JOIN cat_process_definition cpd ON cpi.process_definition_id = cpd.id WHERE cpi.deleted = '0' AND cpi.id = #{id}
